protein_name: Regulatory subunit of the calcium-regulated non-lysosomal thiol-protease which catalyzes limited proteolysis of substrates involved in cytoskeletal remodeling and signal transduction. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: calpain complex; cytoplasm; cytosol; membrane; plasma membrane
raw_fields.Molecular Function: calcium ion binding; calcium-dependent cysteine-type endopeptidase activity; metal ion binding; protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: positive regulation of cell population proliferation; proteolysis; regulation of macroautophagy
